basic_info.description: The IDA recognizes and promotes design visionaries by discovering emerging talent in Architecture, Interior, Product, Graphic, and Fashion Design worldwide.

raw_content.homepage: Home | International Design Awards™ International Design Awards™ – International Design Awards™ IDA 2026 IS NOW OPEN - SUBMIT BY APRIL 15 TO GET A 10% EARLY BIRD DISCOUNT. IDA About Entry Tips Judging Criteria Promoting Winners Work Ceremony disciplines Architecture Interior Product Fashion Graphic winners main winners interviews ranking professional ranking non-professional directory covid grant winning companies winning universities jury jury jury interviews news media mentions partners store trophy & awards books available to buy on Amazon people’s choice 2024 Voting Past Winners submit/login --> --> --> --> --> IDA 2026 IS OPEN FOR SUBMISSIONS! Submit your best work to the International Design Awards and gain global recognition. Take advantage of the Early Bird deadline – April 15 – and receive 10% off your entry fee. SUBMIT NOW --> 19TH ANNUAL IDA AWARDS GALA RECAP February 8, 2026 | ICONSIAM, Bangkok, Thailand From February 6–8, Bangkok welcomed designers, artists, and visionaries from around the world for a dynamic celebration of creativity and innovation. The highlight was the 19th International Design Awards Ceremony and Gala at ICONSIAM’s River Park, where guests gathered for a red carpet reception and awards dinner honoring this year’s outstanding designers. Leading up to the Gala, visitors participated in the IDA Design Talks & Symposium, sharing insights and perspectives on design. The celebration continued with a Networking Party at Lost in Songwat, connecting award winners, partners, and Bangkok’s creative community. A curated photo collection captures the spirit and special moments of the event, available through the links below. --> --> --> Photo Credits: Robert Lesliee Networking Party Gala Awards Ceremony 19th Annual International Design Awards Past year the IDA has introduced NEW categories to acknowledge the evolution of the design industry across architecture, interior, product, graphic and fashion design disciplines. THE IDA 2025 WINNERS ARE HERE! Inviting all architects, interior designers, product designers, graphic designers and fashion designers to submit their creative works into one of THE most respected design awards in the world. Receive worldwide recognition for your creative projects! VIEW IDA 2025 WINNERS HERE   2024 People’s Choice Vote IDA 2024 People’s Choice is now closed. Winners will be announced soon – stay tuned! This year we are offering a $1000 CASH PRIZE in each non-professional discipline for a ‘People’s Choice Award’. IDA Trophies & Awards Winners of the IDA Awards in Gold, Silver, Bronze and Honorable Mentions can purchase a unique IDA trophy here . Guggenheim Foundation. More than a decade after its grand opening in October 1997, the Museum is a reality that has exceeded the most ambitious artistic and cultural expectations, and has contributed in an extraordinary way to the urban, economic, and social regeneration of the city of Bilbao and its surroundings. Learn more Partners, Media & Friends More Partners --> CONTACT IDA INTERNATIONAL DESIGN AWARDS USA 1318 E, 7th St., Suite 140 Los Angeles, CA 90021 USA INTERNATIONAL DESIGN AWARDS EUROPE House of Lucie Gallery H-1055 Budapest, Falk Miksa u. 30., Hungary ABOUT IDA The International Design Awards (IDA) exists to recognize, celebrate and promote legendary design visionaries and to uncover emerging talent in Architecture, Interior, Product, Graphic and Fashion Design. events contact faq privacy policy terms & conditions FOLLOW SUBSCRIBE Marketing permission : By ticking this box, you agree to receive the International Design Awards information, newsletters, event announcements and offers.
